creator: chmeeedalf@gmail.com
text:
When in X on a Titanium PowerBook G4, probably any other ADB-based mac, a mouse up event isn't registered (button isn't registered as clicked) until I move the mouse.  I don't know if this is a property of the ADB bus, or if it's a bug in the driver.

How-To-Repeat: Run FreeBSD+Xorg on an ADB mac.  In this case I ran wmaker.
